scripts.seed:admin: npx ts-node -e 'import { PrismaClient } from "@prisma/client"; import * as bcrypt from "bcrypt"; const prisma = new PrismaClient(); async function run() { const password = "dax1973*"; const hashedPassword = await bcrypt.hash(password, 10); await prisma.admin.create({ data: { username: "admin", nombre: "Admin Principal", password: hashedPassword } }); console.log("Admin creado: admin / dax1973*"); await prisma.$disconnect(); } run();'
scripts.vercel-build: prisma generate && tsc -p tsconfig.json && vite build
